expected_outcome: Competent Java backend engineer capable of creating production-grade REST APIs, integrating databases using JPA, writing unit tests, and securing resources using Spring Security.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily initializing projects using Spring Initializr and wiring beans manually.

mini_project.title: Email Notification Microservice
mini_project.description: Create a service that sends templates, utilizing profiles to switch between simulated Console log outputs and live SMTP transfers.

phases.milestone: Mastered Spring's container concepts, dependency injection, annotations, and property configurations.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing REST routes, setting query params, and coding response validation exceptions.

mini_project.title: Recipe REST Catalog
mini_project.description: Build an API offering filters for ingredients, returning custom validation message exceptions, and formatting structured JSON.

phases.milestone: Familiar with writing HTTP endpoints, validating incoming objects, and parsing body queries.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily configuring local H2 or PostgreSQL servers and mapping entity mappings.

mini_project.title: Tasks Database Registry
mini_project.description: Establish a JPA backend database for tasks, categories, and tags, supporting subtask lists mappings and sorting search filters.

phases.milestone: Proficient in database entities modeling, CRUD operations via repositories, and resolving associations.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily implementing JWT custom filters, mocking dependencies, and checking test coverage statistics.

mini_project.title: Secured Student Portal Backend
mini_project.description: A REST service containing register/login actions, BCrypt encryption, JWT check filters, and JUnit unit tests validation.

phases.milestone: Equipped to lock endpoints, encrypt databases, model mocks, package apps (JARs), and launch production servers.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce Transaction Microservice
major_projects.description: Create a transactional system featuring user account profiles, order mapping arrays, inventories checks, database locking mechanisms, JWT protection, and full integration tests.
